title: Magical Mild Peruvian Vegetable Tiradito
description: A tangy and aerated Peruvian dish featuring serrano ham and vegetarian friendly ingredients, with an al dente finish, perfect for a quick fix meal.

ingredients.name: mixed vegetables
ingredients.notes: such as carrots, zucchini, and bell peppers

instructions: Slice the serrano ham into thin strips and set aside.
In a large bowl, combine the mixed vegetables, lime juice, olive oil, garlic, and ginger.
Toss the vegetables to coat with the dressing and let it sit for 10 minutes.
Season the vegetables with salt and black pepper to taste.
To assemble the tiradito, place a portion of the vegetables on a plate and top with a slice of serrano ham.
Repeat the layers one more time, ending with a slice of serrano ham on top.
Serve immediately and garnish with additional lime wedges if desired.
Refrigerate any leftovers for up to 24 hours.
Before serving, give the dish a good stir and adjust the seasoning if needed.
